'''Janos Marsh''' served as the starship computer expert on board the [[Scout ship/Legends|scout vessel]] ''[[Bright Seeker]]''.

==Biography==
Apparently loyal to [[House Calipsa]], Marsh was in fact, a member of the rival [[House Melantha]]'s [[Covert Activities Cadre]], working to keep House Calipsa from locating a new [[Hyperspace route/Legends|trade route]] through [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]].

Marsh was forced to kill first officer [[Quat Ralto]] when the latter interrupted him contacting House Melantha in the transceiver room of the ''Bright Seeker''.

Marsh eventually made his way to the ''[[Regal Destiny]]'', but was overpowered bya group working for [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Nils Wender]] of the ''Bright Seeker''.
